/usr/bin/clang++ -g -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/AtividadeVivencial2.dir/src/AtividadeVivencial2.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AtividadeVivencial2.dir/common/glad.c.o -o AtividadeVivencial2  _deps/glfw-build/src/libglfw3.a -framework OpenGL -framework Cocoa -framework IOKit -framework CoreFoundation
